long_description: Determines whether customer KYC is fully completed.
Customers with 'Politic' in new_risk_reason OR having PEP relationship (latest assessment)

description: Customers with Missing or Expired KYC Documents
long_description: Identifies customers who either have no KYC documents or have at least one expired document based on expiry_flag.
having_conditions: [{"value": 0, "logical": null, "operator": "=", "expression": "COUNT(kyc_document.document_id_sk)"}, {"value": 1, "logical": "OR", "operator": "=", "expression": "MAX(CASE WHEN kyc_document.expiry_flag = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)"}]

long_description: Lists customers where customer_type_valid is 'No' or 'NA'

description: Customers whose KYC review is due or overdue
long_description: Track customers where KYC review_date is overdue

description: Risk Profile - High risk customers (latest assessment)
long_description: Customers whose most recent risk assessment shows High category

description: Geography Risk Flag based on High Risk Customer Count
long_description: Groups customers by country, counts total and high-risk customers, and flags geographies with 5 or more high-risk customers as High Risk Geography.
Lists all customers with their UBO (Ultimate Beneficial Owner) information including ownership percentage and risk category
Per customer: show KYC completion status, the max days_overdue and list all KYC documents status.
select_columns: {"kyc_document": {"expiry_flag": {"alias": "expiry_flag", "expression": "kyc_document.expiry_flag"}, "document_type": {"alias": "document_type", "expression": "kyc_document.document_type"}, "document_id_sk": {"alias": "document_id", "expression": "kyc_document.document_id_sk"}, "document_status": {"alias": "document_status", "expression": "kyc_document.document_status"}}, "customer_master": {"kyc_id": {"alias": "kyc_id", "expression": "(SELECT MAX(ks2.kyc_id_sk) FROM kyc_status ks2 WHERE ks2.customer_id_sk = customer_master.customer_id AND ks2.days_overdue = (SELECT MAX(ks3.days_overdue) FROM kyc_status ks3 WHERE ks3.customer_id_sk = customer_master.customer_id AND ks3.days_overdue >= 0))"}, "customer_id": "customer_id", "days_overdue": {"alias": "days_overdue", "expression": "COALESCE((SELECT MAX(ks.days_overdue) FROM kyc_status ks WHERE ks.customer_id_sk = customer_master.customer_id AND ks.days_overdue >= 0), 0)"}, "customer_name": "customer_name", "kyc_completion_status": {"alias": "kyc_completion_status", "expression": "CASE WHEN (SELECT MIN(CASE WHEN ks.kyc_completed_flag = 'TRUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM kyc_status ks WHERE ks.customer_id_sk = customer_master.customer_id) = 1 THEN 'Completed' ELSE 'Pending' END"}}}

description: High‑Risk Geography customers that also have a PEP relationship
long_description: Lists customers whose most recent risk assessment is 'High', belong to a geography flagged as High Risk (5 or more high‑risk customers in the country), and have at least one PEP relationship.
usecase: High‑Risk Jurisdiction Concentration with PEP Exposure
